entry.title: Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules for Heart & Brain
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Omega
Price: 299.00

Are you looking for a natural alternative to fish oil supplements to boost your heart and brain health? Cod liver oil capsules are an excellent choice. neuherbs Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules 600 mg offer a potent blend of Omega-3 fatty acids (180mg), Vitamin D3, and Vitamin E in one convenient soft gel. Obtained from the depths of the Atlantic and Pacific oceans, our cod liver oil is a rich source of essential nutrients that support overall well-being.


Cod fish is a time-tested source of Omega-3s, known for their numerous health benefits. These fish get their Omega-3s by absorbing the microalgae after consuming phytoplanktons. Each capsule contains high levels of EPA and DHA, vital for maintaining a healthy heart and sharp mind. Cod liver oil also contains vitamins A and D and remarkable anti-inflammatory properties. So, with neuherbs, you not only get the benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids, but also 100% RDA of Vitamin A, D, and E.


What’s more? Our lemon-flavoured capsules eliminate the unpleasant aftertaste and fishy burps commonly associated with cod liver oil.


Cod Liver Oil Capsules Benefits


neuherbs Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules offer a range of health benefits:


  • Keeps Your Heart Healthy: Omega-3 fatty acids help maintain healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure, promoting cardiovascular wellness.
  • Improves Your Brain Function: DHA is crucial for cognitive function, memory, and focus, supporting a sharp and healthy mind.
  • Boosts Your Immunity: Vitamin D3 and anti-inflammatory drugs help modulate the immune system and keep infections at bay.
  • Maintains Healthy Bones: Vitamin D3 is essential for calcium absorption and bone health, ensuring you have stronger bones, cartilage, and muscles.
  • Offers Antioxidant Support: Vitamin E acts as a powerful antioxidant, protecting cells from oxidative damage. This helps improve gut, skin, and hair health.
  • Nourishes Skin: The anti-inflammatory properties and antioxidants together help boost skin cell production, protect them from stress and inflammation, and reduce the signs of ageing.


Cod Liver Oil Benefits for Female


Omega-3 fatty acids, particularly DHA, are essential during pregnancy for fetal brain development. It can potentially improve your unborn baby’s brain function and retina development. By taking the best cod liver oil for adults, you can also reduce the risks of preterm delivery.


neuherbs Quality Check


neuherbs delivers high-quality health supplements with scientifically tested formulations. Our Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil undergoes molecular distillation and third-party testing for purity, efficiency, and safety. Free from preservatives, artificial colours, flavours, and gluten, they are the best cod liver oil capsules in India.


Dosage and Packaging


neuherbs Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules Omega 3 are available in bottles of 100 capsules. For best results, take one capsule twice daily with a meal.


Consult with a healthcare professional to learn more about your specific health needs and the benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids, Vitamin D3, and Vitamin E.

entry.title: Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg With 821mg Omega 3-6-9, Additional Vitamin D3 & E To Support Heart, Joint & Skin For Women & Men
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Flaxeeds oil Capsules
Price: 499.00 - 998.00 (2 variants)

Are you a vegetarian? Wondering how to incorporate Omege-3s into your daily diet? neuherbs has made it easy for you. Introducing neuherbs’ Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg - your plant-based Omega-3-6-9 powerhouse.  The supplement is a natural and potent source of Omega-3 fatty acids derived from flaxseeds. While fish oil is a popular choice, flaxseed oil provides a vegetarian and vegan-friendly option, rich in alpha-linolenic acid (ALA), a precursor to EPA and DHA.

neuherbs flaxseed oil capsules deliver a 500mg concentrated dose of ALA, supporting overall health and well-being. It also contains 134 mg of Omega-6 (Linoleic acid) and 187mg of Omega-9 (Oleic acid).

In addition, the Omega-3 flaxseed oil supplements are fortified with Vitamin D and Vitamin E to enhance bone and skin health.

 

Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg Benefits

 

As one of the best flaxseed oil capsules in India, neuherbs scientifically-researched product offers a range of health benefits:

  • Supports Heart Health: Flaxseed Omega-3 fatty acids contribute to cardiovascular wellness by helping maintain healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure.
  • Promotes Brain Function: ALA is converted into EPA and DHA, which are crucial for cognitive function, memory, and focus.
  • Reduces Inflammation: Omega-3s possess anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate joint pain, muscle soreness, and other inflammatory conditions.
  • Protects Bone Health: neuherbs flaxseed oil capsules contain plant-based Vitamin D3, which supports bone health and improves signs of deficiency, such as back pain and buckling joints.
  • Supports Healthy Skin and Hair: ALA contributes to skin hydration and elasticity, promoting a healthy complexion and lustrous hair. The addition of Vitamin E, which is a potent antioxidant, further intensifies the results.
  • Flaxseed oil benefits for females: Omega-3 fatty acids, DHA in particular, help in foetal brain development, improving cognitive power and eye health in the womb. Vegetarian moms can also consume neuherbs Omega 3 flaxseed oil tablets to reduce the risks of preterm delivery.

 

neuherbs Quality Assurance

 

neuherbs is committed to delivering the highest quality omega-3 flaxseed oil capsules in India. Our flaxseeds are carefully selected from top organic farmers and cold-pressed to preserve their natural goodness. Each batch undergoes ten-step rigorous testing for purity, potency, and freshness.

Furthermore, the capsules do not contain additives, artificial colours, trans fats, or preservatives.

 

Recommended Dosage and Packaging

 

neuherbs omega 3 flaxseed oil tablets are available in packs of 60 capsules. For best results, take one softgel twice daily with a meal for at least three months. Since it is a natural product, it is recommended to store it in a cool, dry, and dark place to avoid rancidification.

To know more about your heart health and the benefits of Omgea-3 flaxseed oils, consult an expert for free.  Add neuherbs Flaxseed Oil Capsules 1000mg to your everyday meals and experience the numerous benefits of plant-based omega-3s.

entry.title: Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil 1000 mg (Lemon Flavour)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Mini Fish Oil
Price: 399.00 - 999.00 (3 variants)

Are you looking for fish oil small capsules that are easy to swallow? neuherbs’ Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules solves your problem. Introducing the most potent source of Omega-3 fatty acids in a remarkably compact form. While regular fish oil capsules can be large and difficult to swallow, these omega 3 mini capsules offer a convenient and effective alternative.

These small size omega 3 capsules are 50% smaller than regular fish oil capsules, yet they deliver double the strength, providing 360mg of EPA and 240mg of DHA per softgel. Each mini fish oil pill also contains Vitamin E (100% RDA) and Vitamin D3 (100% RDA) to improve bone and skin health.

In addition, forget about the unpleasant fishy taste – these mini fish oil capsules are infused with a refreshing lemon flavour to eliminate fishy aftertaste and burps.


Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules Benefits


As the only brand offering smallest fish oil capsules in India in natural lemon flavour, neuherbs scientifically researched product delivers a range of health benefits:

  • Improves Heart Health: Omega-3 fatty acids, especially EPA, help maintain healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure.
  • Enhances Brain Function: DHA are crucial for cognitive function, memory, and focus.
  • Reduces Inflammation: Omega-3s possess anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate joint pain and muscle soreness.
  • Vitamins D and E: Vitamin E improves absorption of Omega-3s, while Vitamin D ensures healthy bones and cartilage.


neuherbs Quality Assurance


neuherbs is committed to delivering the highest quality omega 3 fish oil mini softgels in India. We test the fish for heavy metal toxicity, including mercury, cobalt, copper, and cadmium, through a process called molecular distillation that offers 100% accurate results. In addition, each batch undergoes rigorous ten-step testing for purity, potency, and freshness.


Recommended Dosage and Packaging


neuherbs omega 3 fish oil mini softgels are available in packs of 120 capsules. For best results, take one small fish oil pill twice daily with a meal.

Consult an expert for free to learn more about your heart health and the benefits of Omega-3 fish oils. Add neuherbs’ Mini Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules to your everyday routine and experience the numerous benefits of concentrated Omega-3s.

entry.title: Omega Seeds Mix with richness of Flax, Pumpkin, Watermelon & Sunflower seeds with omega-3, dietary fiber, protein and essential nutrients helpful for Weight Loss, Heart & Good Skin
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Omega Seeds Mix
Price: 199.00

neuherbs brings to you the highly nutritious Omega-Seeds Mix to help you get the goodness of plant-based or veg Omega- 3 in an easy-to-use snacking pack. This 4-in-1 mix of seeds contains the richness of Flax, Pumpkin, Watermelon & Sunflower seeds to provide various essential nutrients these seeds possess. One of the most vital among them is Omega-3, required by the human body in daily life, but it is difficult for vegetarians to get enough omega-3. This is where neuherbs Omega-Seeds Mix plays an essential role by being a helping hand to meet daily omega-3 requirements, along with the goodness of dietary fiber & protein. So, incorporate these Omega-Seeds Mix into delicious recipes like oatmeal, smoothies, shakes, juices, cakes, and Ladoo's for a healthier tomorrow.

entry.title: Healthy Seeds Mix rich in Vitamin E, healthy fats & Omega-3 for Heart & Brain, Immunity & Bones and Hair & Skin
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Healthy Seeds Mix
Price: 179.00

Made with seeds that carry their own unique benefits, neuherbs Healthy Seeds Mix brings the comprehensive benefits of Pumpkin, Sunflower, Watermelon, Flax and Chia seeds, all packaged in one mix to help you achieve your overall health goals. Being rich in protein, healthy fat, essential vitamins & minerals, neuherbs Healthy Seeds Mix makes a great & healthy option for your untimely hunger cravings. This 5-in-One mix can be enjoyed anytime of the day whether for breakfast with oatmeal & juices or as a late-night munching snack. neuherbs Healthy Seeds Mix can be your wellness companion. Keep it while travelling, going to the office or hiking, it gives you a boost of energy, supports a healthy gut, immunity, heart, brain & bones.

entry.title: Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules - 2500 mg Omega 3 (Lemon Flavored)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Fish Oil
Price: 699.00 - 1799.00 (3 variants)

Neuherbs Deep Sea Fish Oil – Omega-3 Capsules for Daily Wellness

Looking for the best fish oil capsules in India? neuherbs deep sea fish oil offers a triple-strength formula designed to support your overall health. These omega-3 fish oil capsules are lemon-flavoured to eliminate fishy burps, making them the perfect fish oil supplement for men and women alike.

Why Choose Neuherbs Fish Oil Capsules?

Neuherbs brings you premium-quality fish oil capsules sourced from small deep-sea fish like sardines and anchovies. Rich in EPA and DHA, these omega-3 fish oil capsules deliver 2500 mg of pure fish oil per serving and are added with Vitamins E and D3.

  • Heart Health: Promotes healthy cholesterol level and supports cardiac function.
  • Brain Function: Improves memory, focus, & helps manage stress.
  • Skin & Hair: Among the best fish oil capsules for hair growth and glowing skin.
  • Weight Management: Ideal fish oil capsules for weight loss and metabolism support.
  • Joint & Bone Strength: Helps reduce inflammation and aids in muscle recovery.


Product Features

  • Triple-Strength Omega-3 Fish Oil Capsuless (2500 mg per serving, 2 capsules)
  • 1486 mg of Omega-3s: 892 mg EPA + 594 mg DHA
  • Lemon-flavoured softgels – no fishy burps and aftertaste
  • Fortified with Vitamin D3 and E
  • Available size includes fish oil 60 capsules and fish oil 200 capsules
  • Suitable for all: fish oil capsules for women improve hormone health and promote healthy pregnancy and fish oil capsules for men aid in post-workout muscle recovery, and brain and vision health.


Best-Rated Fish Oil Supplements with Quality You Can Trust

Our original fish oil capsules undergo 10 quality checks, including molecular distillation and third-party testing to remove heavy metals like mercury, lead, and arsenic. Whether you're buying your first pack or switching to a cleaner brand, this is the best omega-3 fish oil capsule, acclaimed for purity, potency, and effectiveness.

Affordable Fish Oil Capsules Price in India

With neuherbs, you don’t just get the best omega-3 capsules, you get premium quality at a great value. Whether you are comparing fish oil capsules price or omega-3 capsules price, our range delivers unmatched benefits for the price.

Who Should Use This?

  • Anyone looking for omega-3 fish oil capsules for daily heart and brain health
  • People seeking fish oil capsules for skin ageing or fish oil capsules for hair growth
  • Fitness enthusiasts using fish oil capsules for weight loss and recovery
  • Men and women looking to fill their omega-3 nutritional gap naturally
